response.overview: A newsreel from the 1940s depicts a solemn ceremony to present educator Esther Festini de Ramos Ocampo with an album and a gold medal, gifts from the teachers, students, and alumnae of the Miguel Grau National School. The event was opened by Dr. Isabel de la Peña de Calderón, who spoke about the educator's fruitful work. The gifts were presented by Dr. Virginia León de Izaguirre, a councilwoman of the Transitional Municipal Board of Lima, followed by remarks from Dr. Beatriz Cisneros, director of the Rosa de Santa María National School.
response.title: En el Teatro Municipal
